stemHtml: A flight crew is due to collect an empty passenger jet from the manufacturer on an exceptionally cold winter day. What effects on the V speeds should the crew take into consideration in such a scenario?

options.a: The low weight and cold air will cause V<sub>R</sub> to be less than V<sub>MC</sub>.
options.b: V<sub>R</sub> and V<sub>2</sub> would be equal.
options.c: V2MIN and consequently V2, would be restricted by VMU.
options.d: V<sub>1</sub> could be limited by V<sub>MCG</sub>.
